payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Close-up of the oven front: stainless-steel fascia with a black glass oven window and chrome horizontal handle, two white printed kitchen towels draped over the handle; object is edge-cropped/partial in the image and appears photographed at close range (~0.8 m from camera).
